bird.name: Spotted rail
bird.summary: The spotted rail (Pardirallus maculatus) is a species of bird in the subfamily Rallinae of the rail, crake, and coot family Rallidae. It is…

relations.subject: Spotted rail
relations.evidence: https://www.museum.lsu.edu/~Remsen/SACCCountryLists.htm retrieved July 24, 2022 The spotted rail inhabits wet landscapes including marshes, swamps, rice fields, and wet grasslands
